'''âth-h-t-g''' ('''kathahtegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:electrosynthesize|electrosynthesize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-h-t-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:electrosynthesize|electrosynthesize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-h-t-g
|-
! Lemma
| kathahtegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithahtegoko|thithahtegoko]] || [[word:jithahtegoko|jithahtegoko]] || [[word:shithahtegoko|shithahtegoko]] || [[word:kithahtegoko|kithahtegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthahtegoko|thuthuthahtegoko]] || [[word:jujuthahtegoko|jujuthahtegoko]] || [[word:shushuthahtegoko|shushuthahtegoko]] || [[word:kukuthahtegoko|kukuthahtegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthahtegoko|thuthahtegoko]] || [[word:juthahtegoko|juthahtegoko]] || [[word:shuthahtegoko|shuthahtegoko]] || [[word:kuthahtegoko|kuthahtegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthahtegoko|thuthahtegoko]] || [[word:juthahtegoko|juthahtegoko]] || [[word:shuthahtegoko|shuthahtegoko]] || [[word:kuthahtegoko|kuthahtegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethahtegoko|thethahtegoko]] || [[word:jethahtegoko|jethahtegoko]] || [[word:shethahtegoko|shethahtegoko]] || [[word:kethahtegoko|kethahtegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothahtegoko|thothothahtegoko]] || [[word:jojothahtegoko|jojothahtegoko]] || [[word:shoshothahtegoko|shoshothahtegoko]] || [[word:kokothahtegoko|kokothahtegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothahtegoko|thothahtegoko]] || [[word:jothahtegoko|jothahtegoko]] || [[word:shothahtegoko|shothahtegoko]] || [[word:kothahtegoko|kothahtegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothahtegoko|thothahtegoko]] || [[word:jothahtegoko|jothahtegoko]] || [[word:shothahtegoko|shothahtegoko]] || [[word:kothahtegoko|kothahtegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthahtegoko|thĂŠthahtegoko]] || [[word:jĂŠthahtegoko|jĂŠthahtegoko]] || [[word:shĂŠthahtegoko|shĂŠthahtegoko]] || [[word:kĂŠthahtegoko|kĂŠthahtegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathahtegoko|thathathahtegoko]] || [[word:jajathahtegoko|jajathahtegoko]] || [[word:shashathahtegoko|shashathahtegoko]] || [[word:kakathahtegoko|kakathahtegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathahtegoko|thathahtegoko]] || [[word:jathahtegoko|jathahtegoko]] || [[word:shathahtegoko|shathahtegoko]] || [[word:kathahtegoko|kathahtegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathahtegoko|thathahtegoko]] || [[word:jathahtegoko|jathahtegoko]] || [[word:shathahtegoko|shathahtegoko]] || [[word:kathahtegoko|kathahtegoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
